changelog:
• New: the changelog is now a slick bottom sheet (Metrolist style) — swipe down to dismiss, or tap outside.
• New: open the changelog any time from Settings → About → Changelog.
• The "you just updated" screen is now lighter and only shows the version number; tap "View changes" to read the full changelog.
• The "update available" prompt no longer shows a wall of release notes — it only confirms the version being offered. Read the details after the update lands.
